title: Brazilian Spicy Zesty Chicken Fries
description: A spicy twist on traditional fries, this recipe combines Brazilian flavors with a zesty kick. Perfect for a quick snack or side dish.
instructions: 2. Cut the chicken breast into thin strips.
3. In a bowl, mix together the spicy seasoning and brazillian seasoning.
4. Add the chicken strips to the bowl and toss to coat.
5. Cook the chicken in the air fryer for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, cut the fry into 1-inch pieces.
7. Cook the fry in the air fryer for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy.
8. In a separate bowl, mix together the zesty sauce and a squeeze of lime juice.
9. Once the chicken and fry are cooked, toss them together in a bowl.
10. Drizzle the zesty sauce over the top and serve immediately.
